creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
The 3 files
/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/samba/third_party/iso8601/__init__.py
/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/samba/third_party/iso8601/iso8601.py
/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/samba/third_party/iso8601/test_iso8601.py
are missing when running make package with net/samba43 is configured as shown below. Complete script(1) output is available on request. I cannot rule out pilot error on my part.

root@hostname:/usr/ports/net/samba43 # uname -a
FreeBSD hostname.some.tld 10.3-STABLE FreeBSD 10.3-STABLE #0 r301444: Sun Jun  5 17:59:46 CEST 2016     root@hostname.some.tld:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CUSTOM_KERNEL  amd64

root@hostname:/usr/ports/net/samba43 # svn info /usr/ports
Path: /usr/ports
Working Copy Root Path: /usr/ports
URL: svn://private.svn.mirror/freebsd/ports/head
Relative URL: ^/head
Repository Root: svn://private.svn.mirror/freebsd/ports
Repository UUID: 35697150-7ecd-e111-bb59-0022644237b5
Revision: 417639
Node Kind: directory
Schedule: normal
Last Changed Author: wen
Last Changed Rev: 417639
Last Changed Date: 2016-06-27 10:09:30 +0200 (Mon, 27 Jun 2016)

root@hostname:/usr/ports/net/samba43 # cat /etc/make.conf
WITH_PKGNG=yes
WITH_SSP_PORTS=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/usr/ports/workdirs
TEX_DEFAULT=texlive
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.2 bdb=5 firebird=2.5 gcc=4.8 lua=5.2 mysql=5.6 perl5=5.22 pgsql=9.4 php=5.6 python=2.7 python2=2.7 python3=3.5 ruby=2.2 ssl=openssl tcltk=8.6

root@hostname:/usr/ports/net/samba43 # cat /etc/src.conf
CC=clang
CXX=clang++
CPP=clang-cpp
NO_WERROR=
WERROR=
WITH_CLANG_EXTRAS=yes
WITH_CLANG_FULL=yes
WITH_CTF=yes
WITH_GCC=yes
WITH_GNUCXX=yes
WITH_LIBCPLUSPLUS=yes
WITH_LLDB=yes
WITH_NAND=yes

root@hostname:/usr/ports/net/samba43 # make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for samba43-4.3.9:
     ACL_SUPPORT=on: File system ACL support
     ADS=on: Active Directory client support
     AD_DC=on: Active Directory Domain Controller support
     AIO_SUPPORT=on: Asyncronous IO support
     CUPS=off: CUPS printing system support
     DEBUG=on: With debug information in the binaries
     DEVELOPER=off: With development support
     DNSUPDATE=on: Dynamic DNS update (require ADS)
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     EXP_MODULES=off: Experimental modules
     FAM=on: File Alteration Monitor support
     LDAP=on: LDAP client support
     MANPAGES=off: Build manpages from DOCBOOK templates
     PAM_SMBPASS=off: PAM authentication via passdb backends
     PTHREADPOOL=on: Pthread pool
     QUOTAS=on: Disk quota support
     SYSLOG=on: Syslog logging support
     UTMP=on: UTMP accounting support
====> Options available for the radio DNS: you can only select none or one of them
     NSUPDATE=off: Use samba NSUPDATE utility for AD DC
     BIND99=off: Use bind99 as AD DC DNS server frontend
     BIND910=off: Use bind910 as AD DC DNS server frontend
====> Options available for the radio ZEROCONF: you can only select none or one of them
     AVAHI=off: Zeroconf support via Avahi
     MDNSRESPONDER=off: Zeroconf support via mDNSResponder
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
